response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with deep web, mobile, and DLang backend experience, but the role demands a Principal Performance Architect for AI accelerators with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, and deep-learning workload optimization expertise. The resume shows no GPU/accelerator architecture work, no SIMD/MIMD experience, no SoC modeling, and no DNN training/inference optimization background. The fit is fundamentally a domain mismatch.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s, async I/O)
Brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Long career with demonstrated technical breadth and craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator experience
No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career trajectory is full-stack/web, not hardware performance architecture at Principal level

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling domain
No GPU / SIMD / DNN optimization experience
Some low-level C/C++ and high-performance systems exposure
